creator: bland@FreeBSD.org
text:

>

Quoting original mail for you:

Possible packages related to issue:
multimedia/mencoder
multimedia/mplayer
>>> converters/libiconv

Can you see it now?
I also suggest you to go and look at /usr/ports/Mk/Uses/iconv.mk to avoid confusion going forward.
